title: Feather Weighted MC
description: Feather Weighted MC is a Minecraft modpack that can give up to 1700% more performance boost!
body:
# **Feather Weighted MC**
## Is a Minecraft modpack that can give up to 1700% **Performance Boost**!
It currently utilizes some of the best **performance** boosting mods

### **BEFORE YOU START PLAYING REMEMBER TO DISABLE ENTITY CULLING FROM SODIUM BECAUSE THIS MODPACK HAS ITS OWN ENTITY CULLING MOD THAT IS MUCH BETTER**
![Entity Culling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/266482aa2b124aad3e7b0a0d75a6be18aea0ec9d.png)

Down Here you can Find how Game is performing on my device here are my Specs:
- CPU : AMD Ryzen 5 4600H
- GPU : Mobile GTX 1650 Ti
- RAM : 8 GB DDR4 3200Mhz

With Shaders: 104 FPS
![Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a2c4dbb6425b3701ebbdbef44bcf50de429554e.png)
Without Shaders: 1041 FPS
![NoShaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33dc1f0c6f8eb52ce24efed700e75c255c4777a4.png)
Vanilla:
![Vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/faedf43e5b9bb4333232ca8a5e8b15e76318a62c.png)
